zh.Cole Orton, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Fenton於1398年出生在英國越可爾利福瑟其時，他的父親Henry Fenton II28歲，母親Catherine Bretofte23歲。他和Lady Eleanor Revell至少有1個兒子。他去世於1450年在英國藍卡爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.Cole Orton, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Fenton于1398年出生在英国越可爾利福瑟其时，他的父亲Henry Fenton II28岁，母亲Catherine Bretofte23岁。他和Lady Eleanor Revell至少有1个儿子。他去世于1450年在英国藍卡爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fenton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, in Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Northumberland, Staffordshire, and Nottinghamshire, so called from Old English fenn ‘marsh, fen’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

Irish: English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Fionnachta or Ó Fiachna ‘descendant of Fiachna’, an old personal name Anglicized as Feighney and sometimes mistranslated as Hunt (see Fee 1 and Finnerty ).
Scottish: habitational name from Fenton in East Lothian.

variants.name: Hunt
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name for a hunter, from Middle English hunte ‘hunter, huntsman’ (Old English hunta). The term was used not only of the hunting on horseback of game such as stags and wild boars, which in the Middle Ages was a pursuit restricted to the ranks of the nobility, but also to much humbler forms of pursuit such as bird catching and poaching for food. The word seems also to have been used as an Old English personal name and to have survived into the Middle Ages as an occasional personal name. Compare Huntington and Huntley .
Irish: adopted for various Irish surnames containing or thought to contain the Gaelic element fiadhach ‘hunt’; for example Ó Fiaich (see Fee ) and Ó Fiachna (see Fenton ).
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Hundt  .

variants.name: Fantom
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English fantom, fainton ‘apparition, ghost’. There has been some confusion with Fenton .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Fenton was born in 1398, in Liversedge, Yorkshire, England, his father, Henry Fenton II, was 28 and his mother, Catherine Bretofte, was 23. He had at least 1 son with Lady Eleanor Revell. He died in 1450, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Fenton est né en 1398, à Liversedge, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry Fenton II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Catherine Bretofte, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lady Eleanor Revell. Il est décédé en 1450, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Fenton 1398 in Liversedge, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Fenton II 28 und seine Mutter Catherine Bretofte 23. Er hatte mit Lady Eleanor Revell mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1450 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Fenton è nato il nel 1398 nel Liversedge, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Fenton II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Bretofte, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lady Eleanor Revell. Morì nel 1450, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Liversedge, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Cole Orton, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコーレオルトン
ja.Liversedge, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアリバーセッジ
ja.lifeSummary: Edward Fentonが1398年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリバーセッジで生まれた時，父Henry Fenton IIは28歳，母Catherine Bretofteは23歳であった。彼はLady Eleanor Revellとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1450年にイギリスランカシュアイアで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Fenton(이)가 1398년 영국 요르크실르 라이버세지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Fenton II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Bretofte(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Lady Eleanor Revell(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1450년 영국 랭카실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Fenton nasceu em 1398, em Liversedge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Fenton II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Bretofte, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lady Eleanor Revell. Ele faleceu em 1450, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Fenton родился в 1398 г. в местности ливирседж, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Fenton II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Bretofte, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lady Eleanor Revell. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Fenton nació en 1398, en Liversedge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Fenton II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Catherine Bretofte, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lady Eleanor Revell. Murió en 1450, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
